name: Abundance Revelation
description: Your first sustainable harvest sends a gentle pulse through the living web. Nearby beings feel a noticeable bloom of resources spreading outward. You sense that what you give returns multiplied, and what you hoard slowly withers — the web itself responds with mercy and abundance.
educational_note: This is not instruction. This is direct experience: the web responds to sustainable giving with visible shared blooms and increased future abundance. Hoarding creates scarcity. Mercy and sharing create more for all. Feel the first true step into Resource-Based Economy.
